message:
feat(resize): enable wrap quality scorecard and readability gate by default

Change resize wrap quality defaults from opt-in to enabled:

- scorecard_enabled: false -> true
- readability gate enabled: false -> true
- Tighten thresholds: max_line_badness_delta 0->500,
  max_total_badness_delta 0->2000, max_fallback_ratio_percent 100->20

Add resize_wrap_production_defaults_enable_scorecard_and_gate test
to verify production defaults. Update test helpers and telemetry
infrastructure in screen.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
